purpose: Public-safe structured project map for the homepage portfolio helper.

site.title: Grant McCurdy Systems Portfolio
site.summary: A public portfolio for data systems, analytics products, AI-assisted workflows, workflow automation, and content intelligence.

projects.title: Education Data Simulation Engine
projects.summary: Public-safe simulation foundation for assessment analytics, LMS workflow prototyping, decision-support dashboards, and learning-systems development.
projects.boundary: Uses synthetic generated records and aggregate diagnostics, not real students, LMS exports, private assessment artifacts, or credentials.

projects.title: Assessment Intelligence
projects.summary: Assessment system work for SQL-backed extracts, analytics, reproducible R processing, dashboarding, diagnostics, and decision-support reporting.
projects.boundary: Public artifacts exclude real student names, emails, IDs, grades, rosters, LMS exports, submissions, and private school reporting artifacts.

projects.title: Statistical Risk Modeling in R
projects.summary: Public-safe R risk modeling project for interpretable probability modeling, validation diagnostics, calibration, lift, threshold economics, and executive decision support.
projects.boundary: Uses synthetic account-risk records only and is not intended for automated customer, credit, employment, clinical, or private-data decisions.

projects.title: Assessment-to-Remediation Pipeline
projects.summary: Inspectable prototype connecting math diagnostic evidence to feedback, remediation, mastery checks, and decision-support reporting.
projects.boundary: A public-safe assessment-authoring and review-gate MVP, not a validated standardized test, live LMS deployment, or production Canvas integration.

projects.title: Instructional AI Workflows
projects.summary: LMS-agnostic workflow prototypes for rubric-defined evaluation, draft feedback generation, human review, and student-facing artifacts.
projects.boundary: Uses synthetic submissions, synthetic rubrics, fake course identifiers, and public-safe sample outputs.

projects.title: Content Intelligence
projects.summary: Pipeline for converting unstructured content into source-bounded information objects, searchable corpora, transcript enrichment packets, and source-grounded reports.
projects.boundary: Public examples use synthetic, sanitized, public-domain, or clearly licensed source material.

projects.title: Portfolio Data Lab
projects.summary: Structured analytic chat over a public-safe synthetic education warehouse.
evidence: rendered tables, metrics, notes, and charts
projects.boundary: For synthetic education analytics only; not a source for private student data or private school records.

projects.title: Analytics Dashboard
projects.summary: Static GitHub Pages dashboard over public-safe synthetic warehouse extracts with browser-side aggregation, SVG charts, and filters.
evidence: course, grade, teacher, section, growth, completion, skill, and distribution views
projects.boundary: Uses static public-safe synthetic extract data.

routingRules.intent: visitor asks about statistics or computation over education data
visitor asks about Grant's technical strengths
visitor asks about R, statistics, validation, calibration, or risk models
